description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits WANT for an offered snapshot before MANIFEST or HEADS establishes accepted sync roots.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because SNAPSHOT_OFFER does not establish sync roots without MANIFEST or HEADS.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the missing-head-context violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a prior-head-context negative interop case specific to snapshot-assisted sync.
The harness mutates HELLO to advertise snapshot-sync so the fault fails on missing head context instead of capability gating.
